thirdParty.inner_text:
Commerce Media Platform
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    The connected commerce media environment for the open internet
thirdParty.inner_html: Commerce Media Platform The connected commerce media environment for the open internet

thirdParty.inner_text:
Commerce Growth
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    For marketers & agencies looking for automated acquisition & retention
thirdParty.inner_html: Commerce Growth For marketers & agencies looking for automated acquisition & retention

thirdParty.inner_text:
Commerce Max
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    For brands & agencies looking for retail media on the open internet
thirdParty.inner_html: Commerce Max For brands & agencies looking for retail media on the open internet

thirdParty.inner_text:
Commerce Grid
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    For media owners, agencies, and retailers looking to connect media and commerce with programmatic
thirdParty.inner_html: Commerce Grid For media owners, agencies, and retailers looking to connect media and commerce with programmatic

thirdParty.inner_text:
Commerce Yield
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    For retailers, marketplaces & commerce companies looking to control, scale, and maximize digital asset monetization
thirdParty.inner_html: Commerce Yield For retailers, marketplaces & commerce companies looking to control, scale, and maximize digital asset monetization

thirdParty.inner_text:
For Advertisers
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Connect products to people with performance media and retail media
thirdParty.inner_html: For Advertisers Connect products to people with performance media and retail media

thirdParty.inner_text:
For Retailers
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Earn incremental revenue with retail media
thirdParty.inner_html: For Retailers Earn incremental revenue with retail media
Continue as a media owner

thirdParty.inner_text:
For Agencies
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Differentiate and deliver value with commerce intelligence
thirdParty.inner_html: For Agencies Differentiate and deliver value with commerce intelligence

thirdParty.inner_text:
For Beauty Brands
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    See how our deep Beauty data and expertise power smarter full-funnel advertising
thirdParty.inner_html: For Beauty Brands See how our deep Beauty data and expertise power smarter full-funnel advertising

thirdParty.inner_text:
For Travel Brands
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Go from browsing to booking faster with Criteo’s full-funnel advertising solutions
thirdParty.inner_html: For Travel Brands Go from browsing to booking faster with Criteo’s full-funnel advertising solutions

thirdParty.inner_text:
For CE Brands
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Reach the right electronics shoppers with performance media and retail media powered by commerce intelligence.
thirdParty.inner_html: For CE Brands Reach the right electronics shoppers with performance media and retail media powered by commerce intelligence.

thirdParty.inner_text:
Dynamic Retargeting
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Increase conversions from people who know you with personalized product ads
thirdParty.inner_html: Dynamic Retargeting Increase conversions from people who know you with personalized product ads

thirdParty.inner_text:
Commerce Audiences
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Find (and keep) your next best customer with Commerce Audiences built on real shopper data.
thirdParty.inner_html: Commerce Audiences Find (and keep) your next best customer with Commerce Audiences built on real shopper data.

thirdParty.inner_text:
Retail Media
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Reach and convert shoppers with relevant ads near the digital point of sale
thirdParty.inner_html: Retail Media Reach and convert shoppers with relevant ads near the digital point of sale

thirdParty.inner_text:
Consumer Trends
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    The latest consumer data for 20 countries and 600+ product categories
thirdParty.inner_html: Consumer Trends The latest consumer data for 20 countries and 600+ product categories

thirdParty.inner_text:
Glossary
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Definitions of the most common digital advertising terminology
thirdParty.inner_html: Glossary Definitions of the most common digital advertising terminology

thirdParty.inner_text:
Digital Ad Formats
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Explore our ad formats for video, adaptive, rich media, and more
thirdParty.inner_html: Digital Ad Formats Explore our ad formats for video, adaptive, rich media, and more

thirdParty.inner_text:
Ad Gallery
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Real-world examples for a variety of formats, verticals, and regions
thirdParty.inner_html: Ad Gallery Real-world examples for a variety of formats, verticals, and regions
